title: DN22 9HT, Holcim UK Limited: environmental permit application advertisement - EPR/MP3824SZ/A001
body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received a new bespoke application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 from Holcim UK Limited.  Application number EPR/MP3824SZ/A001  Regulated facility type Application for a bespoke permit for an inert mining waste operation at new sand and gravel quarry near Sturton Le Steeple.  Regulated facility address   Sturton le Steeple QuarryLand east of Sturton le SteepleRetfordDN22 9HT   How to view and comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 10 July 2025.  You can comment:  Online: view and comment on the application using Citizen Space  Via email: pscpublicresponse@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at Privacy Notice "
